properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v5 v5 v6 v7 v8 v9 v5 v6 v10 v11

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Let praise be a weapon that silences the enemy Let praise be a weapon that conquers all anxiety Let it rise, let praise arise We sing Your name in the dark and it changes everything We sing with all we are and we claim Your victory Let it rise, let praise arise

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: We'll see You break down every wall We'll watch the giants fall Fear cannot survive when we praise You The God of breakthrough's on our side Forever we lift Him high With all creation cry, God, we praise You Oh, we praise You, Oh

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Let faith be the song that overcomes the raging sea Let faith be the song that calms the storm inside of me Let it rise, let faith arise Let it rise

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: We'll see You break down every wall We'll watch the giants fall Fear cannot survive when we praise You The God of breakthrough's on our side Forever lift Him high With all creation cry, God, we praise You Oh, we praise You, Oh

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: This is what living looks like This is what freedom feels like This is what Heaven sounds like We praise You, we praise You

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: This is what living looks like This is what freedom feels like This is what Heaven sounds like We praise You, we praise

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: We'll see You break down every wall We'll watch the giants fall Fear cannot survive when we praise You The God of breakthrough's on our side Forever lift Him high With all creation cry, God, we praise You

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: We'll see You break down every wall We'll watch the giants fall 'Cause fear cannot survive when we praise You The God of breakthrough's on our side Forever lift Him high With all creation cry, God, we praise You Oh, we praise You Oh, we praise You Oh, we praise You Oh, we praise You

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: I can't hold back my praise I got to let it out, [x10]

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: We'll see You break down every wall We'll watch the giants fall My fear cannot survive when we praise You The God of breakthrough's on our side Forever lift Him high With all creation cry, God, we praise You
